_comment: Edit this file to update weekly challenges. season_start is the Monday of that season's Week 1 (YYYY-MM-DD). Each subsequent week in the season starts 7 days later. Each challenge needs: week (number), season (number), title, skill, desc, starter. Changes go live immediately after deploy — no code changes required.

challenges.title: Prepare for your 1:1
challenges.desc: Use Claude to prep for tomorrow's manager check-in — updates, blockers, priorities.
challenges.starter: Help me prepare for my 1:1 with my manager tomorrow.

challenges.title: Write a stakeholder update
challenges.desc: Draft a concise project status email for a senior stakeholder who skims. One dependency is at risk.
challenges.starter: Write a project status update email for my stakeholder.

challenges.title: Explain a technical concept
challenges.desc: Explain a concept from your work (e.g. data pipeline, API, process) to a non-technical audience.
challenges.starter: Explain this technical concept in simple terms.

challenges.title: Summarise a long document
challenges.desc: Get Claude to distil a lengthy report, contract, or spec into exactly what you need — no more.

challenges.title: Generate interview questions
challenges.desc: Create tailored interview questions for a role on your team — using few-shot examples to guide tone.
challenges.starter: Generate some interview questions for a role on my team.

challenges.title: Build a 30-60-90 day plan
challenges.desc: Prompt Claude to produce a structured onboarding plan for a new team member joining your project.
challenges.starter: Create a 30-60-90 day plan for a new team member.

challenges.title: Debug a disagreement
challenges.desc: Use Claude to help navigate a real conflict or misalignment — get it to steelman both sides.
challenges.starter: Help me think through a disagreement I'm having at work.

challenges.title: Write a SQL query (or automate a task)
challenges.desc: Technical: ask Claude to write or optimise a query. Non-technical: ask it to automate a repetitive task you do manually.
challenges.starter: Help me write a SQL query to solve this problem.

challenges.title: Turn meeting notes into actions
challenges.desc: Feed Claude messy meeting notes and get a clean action register with owners, deadlines, and priorities.
challenges.starter: Turn these meeting notes into action items.

challenges.title: Write a client proposal section
challenges.desc: Draft the "our approach" section of a proposal for a data services engagement — tailored to a specific client type.
challenges.starter: Help me write the approach section of a client proposal.

challenges.title: Build a decision framework
challenges.desc: Ask Claude to help you think through a real decision — tool choice, vendor, approach — using structured reasoning.
challenges.starter: Help me make a decision about something at work.

challenges.title: Create a data quality checklist
challenges.desc: Generate a practical QA checklist for a dataset or deliverable your team produces — specific enough to actually use.
challenges.starter: Create a data quality checklist for my team.

challenges.title: Red-team your own work
challenges.desc: Ask Claude to find weaknesses in a plan, proposal, or design you've produced — then strengthen it.
challenges.starter: Find weaknesses in this plan I've written.

challenges.title: Chain-of-thought problem solving
challenges.desc: Solve a complex work problem by explicitly asking Claude to think step by step before answering.
challenges.starter: Help me solve this complex problem step by step.

challenges.title: Write a post-mortem
challenges.desc: Turn a project incident or missed deadline into a structured blameless post-mortem with root causes and remediation.
challenges.starter: Help me write a post-mortem for a project issue.

challenges.title: Build a personal prompt library
challenges.desc: Ask Claude to help you design a reusable prompt template for a task you do every week — then test it.
challenges.starter: Help me create a reusable prompt template.

challenges.title: Analyse a dataset pattern
challenges.desc: Describe a dataset or trend you're seeing at work and ask Claude to hypothesise causes and suggest next steps.
challenges.starter: Help me analyse a pattern in this data.

challenges.title: The open challenge
challenges.desc: No prescribed task — submit the most useful thing Claude helped you do this week. Scored on output quality and technique.
challenges.starter: Help me with something useful at work.
